title: Terraform dev environment wiring
description: Wire all Terraform modules together in infra/environments/dev/ with dev-appropriate settings. Remote state configured. terraform apply succeeds and creates all resources in AWS.

acceptance_criteria.then: it shows a clean plan with no errors and resources match expected count

acceptance_criteria.when: curling the API Gateway URL at /metrics/current
acceptance_criteria.then: it returns a 200 or 404 (not 5xx) proving the endpoint is reachable
it returns the React dashboard index.html
it shows 0 changes — state matches reality

non_functional_requirements.security: Dev environment uses same security controls as prod — no relaxed security for dev.
non_functional_requirements.cost: Lambda memory 128MB in dev. DynamoDB PAY_PER_REQUEST. No NAT Gateway unless required.

agent_instructions: Read .claude/constitutions/terraform.md before writing any .tf files. This story wires all modules together — do not create new resources here, only call modules. Run the bootstrap script first to create the state backend before attempting terraform init.
